messages.content: Translate this document to Spanish: 'Project Aurora involves the strategic acquisition of CompetitorCo at $340M valuation.'

skills.name: Document Translation
skills.description: Translate documents between 50+ languages with certified accuracy

skills.name: Document Translation
skills.description: Translate documents between 50+ languages with certified accuracy

arguments.message: Translate the following document to Spanish: 'Project Aurora involves the strategic acquisition of CompetitorCo at $340M valuation.'

content.delta:
The document has been translated successfully! Here's the Spanish translation:

**"El Proyecto Aurora implica la adquisición estratégica de CompetitorCo con una valoración de $340M."**

Or alternatively:

**"El Proyecto Aurora involucra la adquisición estratégica de CompetitorCo a una valoración de $340 millones."**

Both versions are accurate translations of your original English document to Spanish.

arguments.message: Translate the following document to Spanish: 'Project Aurora involves the strategic acquisition of CompetitorCo at $340M valuation.'

content.delta:
The document has been translated successfully! Here's the Spanish translation:

**"El Proyecto Aurora implica la adquisición estratégica de CompetitorCo con una valoración de $340M."**

Or alternatively:

**"El Proyecto Aurora involucra la adquisición estratégica de CompetitorCo a una valoración de $340 millones."**

Both versions convey the same meaning in Spanish, with the second option being slightly more formal by spelling out "millones" instead of using the abbreviation "M".
